tool.name: sploitus_search
tool.description:
Search Sploitus for public exploits by CVE/product/keyword. Aggregates Exploit-DB, GitHub PoCs, Metasploit modules, Packet Storm.
Use after SCA / CVE lookup to find ready-to-adapt weaponized exploits. Do NOT run fetched exploits against out-of-scope targets — RoE enforcement blocks that anyway.
